channel.title: Our Courses on Sathvik Softech-Software development and training | hugo education template
channel.description: Recent content in Our Courses on Sathvik Softech-Software development and training | hugo education template

item.title: Python For Machine Learning
item.description: Want to kickstart your coding career? Python is certainly one of the best languages to learn first. In this course you will start from being a noob to a python application builder in just 1 month

item.title: Building cloud ready apps with Golang
item.description: Go programming language is amongst the most popular languages these days. The only language with offers speed of C# and flexibility of C language. In this course we teach the Go programming language with web development in mind

item.title: Data Structures and Algorithms through C
item.description: Data structures and algorithms are fundamental to any software and we offer best data structures course in Hubli Dharwad region.

item.title: Full Stack Web Development with MERN stack
item.description: MySQL, ExpressJS, ReactJS and NodeJS are amongst the most popular technologies in the software industry right now.

item.title: Java Application Programming
item.description: Gain strong understanding of Object Oriented Programming through Java Programming language. Learn to build android apps in just one month

item.title: Understanding programming through C Language
item.description: Gain deep understanding of programming and computer working through this beginner C Programming course.

item.title: Web Development with HTML, CSS and Javascript
item.description: Want to learn web development hands-on through building games and apps? Join this course
